message:
fix(ci): add scoop shims to GITHUB_PATH after installation

Scoop's installer adds ~/scoop/shims to the user PATH, but this change
doesn't propagate to subsequent GitHub Actions steps. Explicitly write
the shims directory to GITHUB_PATH so scoop commands work in later steps.
Fixes both test-manifests.yml and verify-installation.yml workflows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,6 +84,9 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser -Force
           Invoke-RestMethod -Uri https://get.scoop.sh | Invoke-Expression
+          # Scoop modifies the user PATH but that change doesn't propagate to
+          # subsequent GitHub Actions steps.  Explicitly export the shims dir.
+          "$HOME\scoop\shims" | Out-File -Append -Encoding utf8 $env:GITHUB_PATH
 
       - name: Add local bucket
         shell: pwsh

@@ -25,6 +25,9 @@ jobs:
           if (-not (Get-Command scoop -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) {
             irm get.scoop.sh | iex
           }
+          # Scoop modifies the user PATH but that change doesn't propagate to
+          # subsequent GitHub Actions steps.  Explicitly export the shims dir.
+          "$HOME\scoop\shims" | Out-File -Append -Encoding utf8 $env:GITHUB_PATH
 
       - name: Add bucket
         shell: pwsh
